title: Grit Swooper Map Render File Plan Boundary
forbids: Swooper map artifact renderers or catalog commands acquiring reusable filesystem mutation authority
why: Swooper owns product-specific rendering while @civ7/plugin-files/generated-file-plan owns reusable path admission, currentness inspection, cleanup, and writes.
remediate: Keep Swooper renderers pure and delegate plan inspection or application to @civ7/plugin-files/generated-file-plan.
message: Swooper map artifact filesystem ownership drifted from the plugin-files boundary.
